mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.app_code, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.applicable, r.create_time, r.create_by, r.update_time, r.update_by FROM iam_role_menu rm INNER JOIN iam_role r ON r.role_code = rm.role_code WHERE rm.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND rm.menu_code = #{menuCode} ORDER BY r.sort ASC, r.id ASC
SELECT rm.id, rm.menu_code FROM iam_role_menu rm WHERE rm.deleted = 0 AND rm.role_code = #{roleCode}
